body.title: CLOSED: Relocate network/channels + proxy + system_proxy to acquisition/ + tools/
body.result: channels→acquisition/, proxy→tools/network_proxy.py, system_proxy→tools/system_proxy.py shim; 3 test files re-enabled (60 tests green)
body.description:
network/ deletion (T-igor-network-remove) skipped 3 test files: test_channels.py (D230/D231 acquisition channel framework), test_network_proxy.py (NetworkProxy + HostStats), test_system_proxy.py (SystemProxy facade). These modules need to relocate to agent_datacenter devices or igor/cognition before tests can be re-enabled.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/network/channels/ → agent_datacenter/devices/ or igor/cognition/channels/, wild_igor/igor/network/proxy.py, wild_igor/igor/network/system_proxy.py, tests/test_channels.py, tests/test_network_proxy.py, tests/test_system_proxy.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no-TheIgors-imports from agent_datacenter
**Scope boundary:** In scope: relocate 3 modules and re-enable their tests. Out of scope: changing acquisition channel behavior.
**Test plan:** Remove pytest.skip() from 3 test files; all tests pass after relocation.
